# opnsense_dhcpv4_reservation (Resource)
Manages a dhcpv4 reservation on OPNsense via the Kea DHCP server.
## Example Usage
```terraform
resource "opnsense_dhcpv4_reservation" "printer" {
  subnet      = opnsense_dhcpv4_subnet.lan.id
  ip_address  = "10.0.0.50"
  mac_address = "00:11:22:33:44:55"
  hostname    = "printer"
}
```
<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `ip_address` (String) Fixed IP address to assign.
- `mac_address` (String) MAC address (e.g., `00:11:22:33:44:55`).
- `subnet` (String) UUID of the parent subnet.

### Optional

- `description` (String) Description.
- `hostname` (String) Hostname for the reservation.

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) UUID.
## Import
```shell
terraform import opnsense_dhcpv4_reservation.example 12345678-1234-1234-1234-123456789012
```
